hexSocket.note: Keep frame aspect locked. Never stretch width/height independently or the hex socket becomes distorted.

renderOrder: card artwork clipped to artworkAperture if used
52 neutral tint mask colorized by champion accent, screen/normal at 0.65-0.9 opacity
53 selected glow mask colorized only for selected/hover states
implementationNotes: These highlight layers are extracted from the Imagen base frame itself; they are not generated by CSS shapes or canvas geometry.
For editable color, use tintMaskExact and selectedGlowMaskExact as neutral white masks. The metallic highlights remain image layers above the tint.
Card frame and card art must share the same locked aspect ratio 971:1619. Only scale uniformly.
